25/06/2025, 23:39 Digital currency exchange provider | AUSTRAC

Australian Government

AUSTRAC

Digital currency exchange
provider

Home / Digital currency exchange provider

A reporting entity that exchanges:

e money (Australian or foreign currency) for digital currency

e digital currency for money (Australian or foreign currency)
as part of operating a digital currency exchange business.
See

AML/CTF Act 2006 section 76E

https://www.austrac.gov.au/glossary/digital-currency-exchange-provider
